Dramatic footage captured by Amy Hilton opposite the Gregory & Co jewelry shop in Richmond shows one of the two suspects repeatedly hitting one of the shop’s windows with a sledgehammer, while the other suspect waits by his side holding an empty Ikea bag. The two then start throwing the jewelry displayed in the shop’s window into the bag, as one of the workers inside the shop tries to stop them. The pair then run away down the street. Hilton told Storyful that she was having coffee with her boyfriend in a cafe opposite the jewelry store when she witnessed the robbery.
